clinical_note: Outpatient rheumatology prior-auth request for adalimumab (Humira). Patient: Morgan Ellis, age 47. Diagnosis: rheumatoid arthritis (ICD-10 M06.9), RF and anti-CCP positive. Disease duration: 9 months. Methotrexate trial: 14 weeks at stable dose. Failed conventional DMARDs: 2 (documented trials). Today's DAS28 score: 3.4. Requesting continuation authorization for Humira.

payer_policy.rules: Coverage requires confirmed rheumatoid arthritis (ICD-10 M05/M06), disease duration of at least 6 months, failure of at least 2 conventional DMARDs, DAS28 score of at least 3.2, and a methotrexate trial of at least 12 weeks.
